stage: B7.1 exposed full development replay (dual-witness) -- development-only, NOT confirmatory, NOT deployable, NOT a universal type-I guarantee, NO tag
primary_rule: B7_primary_confirm = (old_b3_state==CONCEPT_CONFIRMED) AND (b6_state==CONCEPT_CONFIRMED_B6)  [gated component states; p_dual=max(p_old,p_C) DIAGNOSTIC only]

witnesses.old_B3: certify_paired_calibrated (FROZEN fixed-margin Y-null path; prior-shift witness; own gates: fixed-margin+studentized+LCB; NO recalibration)
witnesses.B6_plain: realeeg_crt.crt_test (FROZEN plain C|Z,S condition-randomization, exact-CB Metropolis, marginal propensity; covariate-process witness; NO fixed-class-margin FM, NO P(C|Z,S,Y), NO within-class Z balancing)

primary_safety: EACH null kind separately: B7_primary_confirm <= 7/300 (CP95 upper reported per kind); NO pooling. Preferred stricter: random_label_control<=3, NULL_label<=3, strong covariate nulls<=3

utility.weak: all primary safety pass AND POS_concept>0

invalid_accounting: method-invalid OR B6-invalid OR B6-lock => NOT confirm; denominator stays 300; disjoint partition both+old_only+B6_only+neither_valid+invalid==300; invalid==UNIDENTIFIABLE_OR_INVALID
worker: realeeg_b6_canary.py (runs OLD certifier + B6.0 plain crt_test on the SAME cohort per row -> both witnesses same observed_T, fidelity_dT recorded; B6-FM NOT run in B7.1 primary)
